ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock/company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the stock operates */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock in billions */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock information was last updated */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date of the stock */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock is listed */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry within the sector */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock to which the price data belongs */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for dividends and stock splits */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount paid on the given date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Stock split ratio on the given date */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price of the stock on the given date */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the price data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the transaction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being transacted */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Number of shares transacted */,
  "price_per_share" REAL /* Price per share at the time of the transaction */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "base_year" INTEGER /* Base year for the index calculation */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the index */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the index information was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the market index */,
  "last_trading_date" TEXT /* Date of the last trading day for the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price drop, price rise) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, disabled) */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the alert should remain active */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was last triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the portfolio information was last updated */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio to which the stock belongs */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost per share of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the portfolio stock entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)
